def positive_order_dependent_set_to_list_conversion_exposed_in_public_result():
    rule_id = "order_dependent_set_to_list_conversion_exposed_in_public_result"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag public outputs that rely on unstable set iteration order."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
